composition.Programmer 1: Fix and complete the Flask application templates for the 'FoodDelivery' web application, starting with creating the missing 'dashboard.html' template file. This includes implementing the HTML structure and elements for the Dashboard page as specified in the requirements document  a main container div with ID 'dashboard-page', a featured restaurants display div with ID 'featured-restaurants', and buttons with IDs 'browse-restaurants-button', 'view-cart-button', and 'active-orders-button' for navigation. Ensure the template uses Flask's url_for for navigation links. After completing 'dashboard.html', create and verify other required templates (e.g., restaurants.html, menu.html, item_details.html, cart.html, checkout.html, active_orders.html, track_order.html, reviews.html, write_review.html) to fully support all routes defined in app.py, following the page design and element specifications in the requirements document. This task is critical to resolve the TemplateNotFound error and enable the Flask app to render all pages correctly.
